assertions.summary: The exact pr-auth-tenant catching lane completed successfully (exit code 0); the manifest includes the expected lane01 runtime-policy regression coverage, and ci_risk_router routed the packet to run_auth_tenant=true.

steps.action: Run bash scripts/run_test_manifest.sh --profile pr-fast --label auth-tenant --manifest ci/pr_manifests/pr_auth_tenant.txt
steps.expected: The exact catching lane executes the auth-tenant shard and exits 0.
steps.observed: The command ran 18 selectors, Maven reported BUILD SUCCESS, and the wrapper recorded exit code 0.

steps.action: Inspect ci/pr_manifests/pr_auth_tenant.txt for lane01 runtime-policy regression coverage
steps.expected: The manifest includes canonical writer/control-plane, same-node runtime enforcement, auth/runtime, and stale-writer/public-contract proof.
steps.observed: The manifest contains TS_RuntimeTenantPolicyControlExecutableCoverageTest, TS_RuntimeTenantRuntimeEnforcementTest, CompanyControllerIT, TenantRuntimeEnforcementAuthIT, CompanyContextFilterControlPlaneBindingTest, OpenApiSnapshotIT, and AdminSettingsControllerTenantRuntimeContractTest.

steps.expected: Relevant lane01 changes route to run_auth_tenant=true.
steps.observed: The router output set run_auth_tenant=true for head 9e3080db284bb8239e3922defa63dffc3b0b9d06.

summary: VAL-CROSS-002 passed: the exact pr-auth-tenant lane succeeded, manifest coverage matches the lane01 runtime-policy regression bundle, and ci_risk_router routed the packet to auth-tenant.
